title: Why You Must See The Antelope Canyon

scenes.text: These slot canyons glow with incredible light patterns.
This is Antelope Canyon, located in Arizona, USA.
Water erosion over thousands of years shaped these surreal canyon walls.
The best views are in the upper canyon.
scenes.label: BEST VIEWS HERE

scenes.text: Follow to see the world's hidden places.

description: 📍 Antelope Canyon, Arizona - United States. A stunning display of light and shadow in the canyon's walls. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
